religiowikicustomizer: Display name of [[Special:ReligiowikiCustomizer]] used in [[Special:SpecialPages]] and as the message key convention for a special page's canonical name.
religiowikicustomizer-title: Page title shown at the top of Special:ReligiowikiCustomizer.
religiowikicustomizer-field-primary: Label for the primary/link color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-secondary: Label for the secondary/accent color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-background: Label for the page background color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-surface: Label for the elevated-surface (cards, sidebar boxes) color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-border: Label for the border color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-text: Label for the main text color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-textmuted: Label for the muted/secondary text color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-fontfamily: Label for the font-family field (raw CSS font-family value).
religiowikicustomizer-field-fontsizebase: Label for the base font-size field (raw CSS value).
religiowikicustomizer-field-maxwidth: Label for the max content width field (raw CSS value).
religiowikicustomizer-help-colorformat: Help text shown under each color field explaining the expected hex format.
religiowikicustomizer-reset: Label of the button that deletes saved settings, falling back to the extension's built-in defaults.
religiowikicustomizer-saved: Success message shown after saving the form.
religiowikicustomizer-error-invalidcolor: Validation error shown when a color field isn't a valid hex color.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-aparencia: Tab label for the Fase 1 theme (colors/typography/width) form.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-css: Tab label for the Fase 2 custom CSS editor.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-js: Tab label for the Fase 2 custom JavaScript editor.
religiowikicustomizer-field-customcss: Label for the custom CSS textarea.
religiowikicustomizer-field-customjs: Label for the custom JavaScript textarea.
religiowikicustomizer-preview: Label of the button that applies the current (unsaved) textarea content locally, in the admin's own browser only.
religiowikicustomizer-css-help: Explanatory text shown above the custom CSS textarea.
religiowikicustomizer-js-warning: Mandatory security warning shown above the custom JavaScript textarea. Parsed as wikitext ('''bold''' supported).
log-name-religiowikicustomizer: Name of this extension's log type, shown in the Special:Log type selector.
log-description-religiowikicustomizer: Description shown at the top of Special:Log/religiowikicustomizer.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-savetheme: Log entry shown when an admin saves the theme (colors/typography/width) form. $1 is the performer's user link (via {{msg-mw|Logentry-religiowikicustomizer-savetheme}} formatting conventions, same as other log types).
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-resetthem: Log entry shown when an admin clicks "Restore defaults" on the theme form. $1 is the performer's user link.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-savecss: Log entry shown when an admin saves the custom CSS textarea. $1 is the performer's user link.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-savejs: Log entry shown when an admin saves the custom JavaScript textarea. $1 is the performer's user link.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-savehomep: Log entry shown when an admin saves the homepage builder form. $1 is the performer's user link.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-homepage: Tab label for the Fase 3 homepage builder.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-order: Label for the numeric field controlling a homepage block's display order (lower first).
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-enab: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Hero Banner homepage block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-titl: Label for the Hero Banner's title field.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-subt: Label for the Hero Banner's subtitle field.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-bg: Label for the Hero Banner's optional background image URL field.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-ctat: Label for the Hero Banner's optional call-to-action button text field.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-hero-ctal: Label for the Hero Banner's optional call-to-action button link field.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-cards-ena: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Cards homepage block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-cards-ite: Label for the Cards block's JSON items textarea.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-cards-hel: Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the Cards block. Contains a <code> example, parsed as wikitext.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-featured-: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Featured Articles homepage block.
Label for the Featured Articles block's JSON page-title-list textarea.
Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the Featured Articles block, and noting that automatic (most-viewed) mode isn't implemented yet.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-categorie: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Categories homepage block.
Label for the Categories block's JSON category-name-list textarea.
Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the Categories block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-search-en: Checkbox label to enable/disable the embedded Search box homepage block.
religiowikicustomizer-card-readmore: Link text shown at the bottom of a homepage Card, when the card has a link configured.
religiowikicustomizer-search-placeholder: Placeholder text of the search input in the homepage's embedded Search block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-noticias-: Checkbox label to enable/disable the News homepage block (Fase 4).
Label for the News block's JSON items textarea.
Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the News block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-livros-en: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Books homepage block (Fase 4).
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-livros-it: Label for the Books block's JSON items textarea.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-livros-he: Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the Books block.
religiowikicustomizer-homepage-estatisti: Checkbox label to enable/disable the Statistics homepage block (Fase 4).
Label for the Statistics block's JSON items textarea.
Help text explaining the expected JSON shape for the Statistics block.
religiowikicustomizer-accordion-defaultt: Fallback label used by <rwaccordion> when the 'titulo' parameter is missing.
religiowikicustomizer-tabs-defaultlabel: Fallback label used by <rwtabs> for a segment with no label line. $1 is the tab's 1-based position.
religiowikicustomizer-infobox-grupo: Label for the "Grupo" (classification group) row of the <rwinfobox> widget (Fase 5).
religiowikicustomizer-infobox-relacionad: Label for the "Relacionadas" row of the <rwinfobox> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-infobox-textocentr: Label for the "Texto central" row of the <rwinfobox> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-infobox-origem: Label for the "Origem" row of the <rwinfobox> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-book-autor: Label for the author row of the <rwbook> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-book-ano: Label for the year row of the <rwbook> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-book-editora: Label for the publisher row of the <rwbook> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-book-sinopse: Label for the synopsis row of the <rwbook> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-author-datas: Label for the dates row of the <rwauthor> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-author-tradicao: Label for the tradition/school row of the <rwauthor> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-author-obras: Label for the main-works row of the <rwauthor> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-religion-origem: Label for the origin row of the <rwreligion> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-religion-periodo: Label for the period row of the <rwreligion> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-religion-ramos: Label for the branches/schools row of the <rwreligion> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-school-fundador: Label for the founder row of the <rwschool> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-school-periodo: Label for the period row of the <rwschool> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-school-conceitos: Label for the main-concepts row of the <rwschool> widget.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-seo: Tab label for the Fase 6 SEO settings.
religiowikicustomizer-seo-sitename: Label for the site name override field, used in JSON-LD WebSite schema.
religiowikicustomizer-seo-description: Label for the default (site-wide fallback) meta description field.
religiowikicustomizer-seo-ogimage: Label for the default Open Graph image URL field.
religiowikicustomizer-seo-twitter: Label for the Twitter/X handle field, used in the twitter:site meta tag.
religiowikicustomizer-seo-help: Help text explaining the {{#rwseo:description|...}} parser function for per-page meta description override. Contains <nowiki> and <code>, parsed as wikitext.
religiowikicustomizer-breadcrumb-home: Label of the "Home" link in the breadcrumb trail shown above articles.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-saveseo: Log entry shown when an admin saves the SEO settings form. $1 is the performer's user link.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-performance: Tab label for the Fase 7 performance settings.
religiowikicustomizer-performance-lazyim: Checkbox label to enable native browser lazy loading on article images.
religiowikicustomizer-performance-preloa: Label for the newline-separated list of font URLs to preload.
Help text explaining the preload-fonts field. Contains <code>, parsed as wikitext.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-saveperfo: Log entry shown when an admin saves the performance settings form. $1 is the performer's user link.
religiowikicustomizer-tab-exportimport: Tab label for the Fase 8 export/import form.
religiowikicustomizer-export-label: Label for the read-only textarea showing the current full configuration as JSON.
religiowikicustomizer-import-label: Label for the textarea where an admin pastes JSON to import.
religiowikicustomizer-import-confirm: Checkbox label the admin must tick before the import form can be submitted.
religiowikicustomizer-import-submit: Submit button label for the import form.
religiowikicustomizer-exportimport-help: Help text explaining the export/import tab's backup behavior.
religiowikicustomizer-import-done: Success message shown after a configuration import.
religiowikicustomizer-import-notconfirme: Error shown when submitting the import form without ticking the confirmation checkbox.
religiowikicustomizer-import-invalidjson: Error shown when the pasted import text isn't valid JSON.
logentry-religiowikicustomizer-import: Log entry shown when an admin imports a full configuration. $1 is the performer's user link.
